title: True: Trailers
body:
# ![Welcome!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf23705f4c3e314b6a2673fd02265fc37cc39818_0.webp) Welcome!
![Modpack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd238591172e4ed1b7e0630870bceec1c385e734.png)

## ![Description!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c449e70988b4c7cf4a1cf4f733f93ed19ba45c6.png) Description

True Trailers is a project that aims to add more visual effects and mods that add life to the game! The project revolves around the feel of the original Minecraft Trailers (for their new updates, not for the movie!), so it focuses more on improving ideas shown in trailers into the base game instead of adding entirely new concepts. 

The Modpack uses the simplistic artstyle of those trailers in the form of resourcepacks like Bare Bones! Simplicity is key for this modpack, so mods that add new forms of gameplay are kept to a minimum to allow for an almost entirely Vanilla experience!

## ![Questions?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31898958fcb267a308f8ef798657188ddef20b0f.png) Questions?

<details>
<summary>Why Can't I Turn Off The Stupid Resourcepacks?</summary>

The modpack focuses heavily on the bare bones part of the game trailers so resourcepacks arent easily configurable to turn on and off yet.. sorry! 

I'm thinking about making GUIs toggleable for dark and light modes though..

</details>


<details>
<summary>I'm Experiencing Issues!</summary>

I'll probably end up fixing it in a future update but if i don't i might end up making some kind of discord for those things but for now you can just dm me. Try reopening the modpack maybe?

</details>


<details>
<summary>I Have A Different Question!</summary>
I might eventually open a discord for questions if this modpack needs it but until then either dm me or find a different way to solve it i guess..

</details>






Lastly, Enjoy!
